summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Finance Module restructure. All features working correctly: Entity Selector (CLT Active, MILES Under Development), Finance Layout with left sidebar navigation, Chart of Accounts with Add/Edit functionality, Commission Engine and Commission Settlements pages.
passed_tests: Finance Entity Selector page loads at /finance
CLT Academy entity card shows with 'Active' badge (green)
MILES entity card shows with 'Under Development' badge (amber)
Clicking CLT Academy navigates to /finance/clt/dashboard
Clicking MILES does NOT navigate (correctly disabled for under development)
Finance Layout loads with left sidebar navigation
Left sidebar has OVERVIEW section with Dashboard
Left sidebar has ACCOUNTING section with Journal Entries, Settlements, Expenses, Transfers, Chart of Accounts
Left sidebar has COMMISSIONS section with Commission Engine, Commission Settlements
Back to Entities button returns to /finance entity selector
Chart of Accounts page loads at /finance/clt/accounts
Chart of Accounts shows table with Code, Name, Type, Subtype, Currency, Status, Actions columns
Add Account button opens modal with Code, Name, Type, Subtype, Currency, Description fields
Edit button (pencil icon) visible for each account row
Edit Account modal opens with pre-filled data
Edit Account modal has Update Account button
Commission Engine page loads at /finance/clt/commission-engine
Commission Engine shows stats cards (Pending Commissions, Paid This Month, Active Agents)
Commission Engine shows Recent Commissions table
Commission Settlements page loads at /finance/clt/commission-settlements
Commission Settlements shows total pending amount
Commission Settlements shows Settlement History table
Navigation between all Finance sub-pages works correctly via sidebar
data-testid attributes present on key elements (finance-entity-selector, entity-clt, entity-miles, finance-layout, accounts-page, commission-engine-page, commission-settlements-page, nav-* items)
critical_code_review_comments: Finance module restructure implemented correctly with entity-based navigation
Left sidebar navigation follows proper UX patterns with section groupings
MILES entity correctly disabled with visual indicator (Under Development badge)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Modal forms have proper field validation and pre-fill for edit mode
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing seeded accounts from previous testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance module restructured with entity-based navigation. Key routes: /finance (entity selector), /finance/clt/* (CLT entity pages). Left sidebar navigation includes: Dashboard, Journal Entries, Settlements, Expenses, Transfers, Chart of Accounts, Commission Engine, Commission Settlements. MILES entity is under development and disabled. All features verified working.

features_verified.finance_entity_selector: Working - Shows CLT (Active) and MILES (Under Development)
features_verified.finance_layout: Working - Left sidebar with all navigation sections
features_verified.chart_of_accounts: Working - Add/Edit account functionality with modal forms
features_verified.commission_engine: Working - Stats cards and Recent Commissions table
features_verified.commission_settlements: Working - Total pending and Settlement History table
